prestazioni: LS1 (Gen III 5.7L V8, engine code LS1) swap with a forged rotating assembly from Mahle (forged pistons, 4340 steel crankshaft, and H-beam connecting rods) paired with a custom camshaft grind from Comp Cams (230/236 duration at 0.050", 0.600" lift, 114 LSA) for a 650+ HP naturally aspirated build, utilizing AFR 225cc cylinder heads with titanium retainers and PAC racing valve springs

Custom turbocharged setup using a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbo (88mm compressor wheel, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) on a Precision Turbo 6266 wastegate, feeding into a custom 4" stainless steel intercooler piping system with a PWR 4-core intercooler (1200 CFM airflow) and a dual Bosch 044 fuel pump setup with Aeromotive FPR for E85 compatibility

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Tremec T56 Magnum 6-speed transmission with a McLeod twin-disc RST clutch (puck-style, 1200 lb-ft capacity), a Strange Engineering 9" rear end with 3.73:1 gears, C-clip eliminators, and a Detroit Truetrac differential, paired with G-Force carbon fiber driveshaft and polygraphite motor mounts from Energy Suspension
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a modified Rocket Bunny V3 kit (extended fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler) with a 2" wider track achieved via custom fabricated steel wheel spacers and relocated suspension pickup points

Full custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro SRD-E fixed-back bucket seats (90s JDM-inspired, red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), a custom roll cage from The Cage Shop (8-point chromoly, bolt-in design with harness bar), and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom gauge cluster using AEM X-Series digital gauges (boost, AFR, oil pressure, and wideband)

Exterior paint scheme in a custom mix of PPG Deltron "Inferno Orange" with matte black accents (hood, roof, and rear valence), paired with HRE FF01 wheels (19x10.5 front, 19x12 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear), and a custom dual-exit exhaust system with Burns Stainless 3" mandrel-bent piping and Borla Pro XS mufflers
